query: SELECT t.TABLE_NAME, IF(c.COLUMN_NAME IS NULL, 'MISSING', 'EXISTS') as dataOrigin_status FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES t LEFT JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS c ON t.TABLE_SCHEMA=c.TABLE_SCHEMA AND t.TABLE_NAME=c.TABLE_NAME AND c.COLUMN_NAME='dataOrigin' WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND t.TABLE_NAME IN ('clients', 'projects', 'quotations', 'appointments', 'tasks', 'notifications', 'expenses') ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT t.TABLE_NAME, IF(c.COLUMN_NAME IS NULL, 'MISSING', 'EXISTS') as dataOrigin_status FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES t LEFT JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS c ON t.TABLE_SCHEMA=c.TABLE_SCHEMA AND t.TABLE_NAME=c.TABLE_NAME AND c.COLUMN_NAME='dataOrigin' WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA=DATABASE() AND t.TABLE_NAME IN ('clients', 'projects', 'quotations', 'appointments', 'tasks', 'notifications', 'expenses') ORDER BY t.TABLE_NAME;
stdout:
TABLE_NAME	dataOrigin_status
appointments	EXISTS
clients	EXISTS
expenses	MISSING
notifications	MISSING
projects	EXISTS
quotations	EXISTS
tasks	MISSING
